features.name: packed array with ascending dimension
features.description: Code should include a packed array declaration with an ascending (little-endian) dimension such as [0:3] instead of [3:0]

features.name: unpacked array with ascending dimension
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration with an ascending (little-endian) dimension such as [0:3]

features.name: mixed packed unpacked array with ascending packed dimension
features.description: Code should include a mixed packed/unpacked array where the packed dimension is ascending (little-endian) such as logic [0:3] arr[3:0]

features.name: multi-dimensional packed array with ascending dimension
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional packed array with an ascending (little-endian) dimension like [0:3][3:0]
